name: The Eyes
short_description: Follow Hisoka Kageyama, a desperate man who accepts the grim job of night watchman in an abandoned prison. As he navigates its dark corridors, surreal visions and eerie presences lurk around every corner. Can you discover the secrets hidden within these walls?
detailed_description:
Gameplay

The Eyes: a journey into the depths of fear

If you are looking for an experience that can really put the chills on you, ‘The Eyes’ might be the perfect game for you. This title succeeds in mixing elements of psychological tension and survival dynamics, offering a disturbing adventure that will leave you with no respite.

A nightmarish atmosphere

The first thing that strikes you about ‘The Eyes’ is the claustrophobic and dark atmosphere. The narrow corridors and dimly lit rooms create a constant sense of danger, prompting you to watch your back at all times. The clever use of sound effects, including creaking doors and sinister whispers, makes it all the more distressing.

Compelling game mechanics

Over the course of the game, you must gather clues and resources as you desperately search for a way out. Exploration is key: every nook and cranny could conceal a useful object or a crucial clue to your survival. However, the sudden appearance of disturbing entities will force you to manage your moves carefully, balancing the desire to discover new environments with the need to save yourself.

A disturbing antagonist

One of the most distinctive aspects of ‘The Eyes’ is the creature - or presence - that haunts where you are. This is not the usual ‘monster’ to be confronted head-on: here it is something more devious, which seems to be watching you at all times. What makes everything even more tense are the ‘eyes’ scattered around the environment: every time you activate them, you trigger a kind of ‘alarm’ that summons the creature. So, as well as having to follow tracks and interpret the telltale signs indicating how and where it moves, you will have to handle these eyes with care, knowing full well that using them recklessly could instantly trigger a merciless hunt. Tension skyrockets whenever you sense that you are on the verge of being discovered... and that the next wrong move could spell the end of your race.

Conclusion

‘The Eyes’ is a title that knows how to get the adrenaline pumping. If you love gloomy atmospheres and games that test your mettle, this experience will give you moments of pure anxiety. Prepare yourself for a world of dark rooms, eerie sounds and long corridors where every shadow can be your worst enemy. A must for horror fans and anyone who wants to experience an adventure out of the ordinary, even if it might cost a few sleepless nights at times.
